predecessor_artifacts.description: Includes execution-plan and (if decomposed) the unit spec

unit_spec_path.description: Path to unit spec YAML. Required for non-fast-path code generation.

fast_path.description: FAST_PATH mode — skip plan gate, skip re-spawn, stripped output. When true, no plan file is written.

merged_plan_generate.description: SMALL-tier merged mode — write the plan file inline and proceed to generation in the same spawn (single approval gate at the end). The plan IS still written to disk; only the separate plan-approval gate is removed. Mutually exclusive with fast_path.

constraints.description: FAST_PATH constraints (e.g. TDD required, no architectural decisions)

model_override.description: Model to use for this stage. Overrides tool default. Set by orchestrator from budgets/default.yaml.

design_system_path.description: Path to design-system/ root. Set by project-profile when ui=true. Null when no design system exists.

has_figma_data.description: Set by project-profile when figma/ dir or *.figma.json files exist in the workspace.

figma_snapped_path.description: Path to figma/snapped.json after figma-snap ran. Absent when has_figma_data is false.

figma_archaeologist_mode.description: Set when >10 corrections made during figma snap — triggers Arqueólogo fallback in code-generator.

inception_plan_path.description: Path to the inception execution plan markdown (aidlc-docs/inception/plans/<run-id>-execution-plan.md). Set by orchestrator so code-generator can tick off inception tasks after unit completion.

inception_task_ids.description: Inception plan task IDs (e.g. ['ING-T4', 'ING-T5']) that belong to this unit. Code-generator marks these [x] in inception_plan_path after all tasks are done.

ui_intent.description: Semantic UI plan from functional design. Each entry maps a needed component to a primitive or pattern.
